# FFCAP_ET_SAWTOOTHDOWN | Apple Developer Documentation

-  FFCAP_ET_SAWTOOTHDOWN 

Global Variable# FFCAP_ET_SAWTOOTHDOWN

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFCAP_ET_SAWTOOTHDOWN: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffcap_et_sawtoothdown#Discussion)

The effect represents a sawtooth down force effect.
